description: Maps CLI harness config directories and symlink strategy for cli-wrapper ecosystem. Claude is the single source of truth.

codex.note: Codex agents use .md frontmatter + .toml sidecar. Setup generates .toml from .md frontmatter automatically.

gemini.note: Gemini uses its own skills/ dir (not symlinked). Each skill gets an individual symlink.

agy.note: Agy agents directory may not exist. Setup creates it.

opencode.note: OpenCode agents directory may not exist. Setup creates it.

config_policy_block:
## 🔌 CLI Wrapper Policy (managed by cli-wrapper-setup)

⚠️  **PREFER** `/cli-wrapper:<cli>-cli invoke ...` over raw `<cli> ...` commands.
Wrapped CLIs save 60-95% tokens per invocation.
Available wrappers: claude-cli, gemini-cli, codex-cli, opencode-cli, agy-cli.
List all: `/cli-wrapper list`
Audit: `/cli-wrapper audit all`
Reconfigure: `/cli-wrapper:cli-wrapper-setup`
